channel.title: Posts on My Learn-Improve Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Learn-Improve Blog

item.title: Introduction to C Programming
item.description: Let’s start with an example that almost everyone who wants to know about this subject knows. Basic Simple : Hello World! #include <stdio.h> int main() { printf("Hello Wordl!"); return 0; } # An Important Note: On windows operating system, here also when using different compliers,#include <conio.h> and after the printf fonctions getch() should add. This is a funtion that needs to be added to prevent the running code from appearing for a snapshot and going back.

item.title: About Fundamentals
item.description: Programs What Is The Program? The meaning of the program is the executable text specific to hardware of the devices. 1 and 0 codes are run as much as the processor of the device acceptes. If we examine the working of the program with an example : When a program with .exe extension or a program is run in a diffrent operating systems, certain commands are sent to the processor simultaneously with the execution of the binary codes of this program.
